# Squirrelll.ing

> Community-based micro-fintech platform that helps people earn, save, and
> grow money in small daily steps — through the Daily Pool, Savings Pods,
> round-ups, and gamified financial tools.

Squirrelll.ing (pronounced "squirrel-ing") is a pre-launch fintech app
built for anyone looking to earn money online, find a side hustle, build
passive income, invest small or large amounts, or use a simple budgeting
and savings app. The platform turns everyday spending and tiny
contributions into automated savings, micro-investments, and community
rewards through the Daily Pool. It combines round-up savings, goal-based
Savings Pods, a community Daily Pool gamification mechanic, and budgeting
tools to make consistent saving and earning feel effortless. The site
currently runs an email waitlist while the mobile apps are being prepared
for launch.

## Who Squirrelll.ing is for

- People looking to earn money online or through a side hustle.
- People interested in passive income and micro-reward opportunities.
- People who want to invest small amounts or start with bigger investments.
- People searching for a budgeting app or savings app to manage daily money.
- Anyone who wants to save spare change automatically and grow it over time.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, hero, features, how it works, waitlist signup.
- [What is Squirrellling](/what-is-squirrelll.ing): Long-form explainer of the concept, mechanics, and FAQs.

## Tools

- [Round-Up Savings Calculator](/round-up-calculator): Estimate how much you can save by rounding up everyday purchases.
- [Budget Calculator](/budget-calculator): Plan monthly budgets across income, expenses, and savings goals.

## Core Features

- Daily Pool: Contribute a small fixed amount (e.g., $0.20–$1, set by your
  region's currency) into a regional community pool. One participant from
  your region receives the entire pool each day, minus a 12% platform fee.
  Every region has its own separate pool. Participation is optional.
- Savings Pods: Set personal savings goals and schedules (daily or weekly).
  Automatic deposits work like a subscription. Track progress, celebrate
  milestones, and withdraw once you reach your goal. Multiple pods are
  supported.
- Round-Up Savings: Save spare change by rounding up everyday purchases.
- Waitlist: Join the Squirrelll-Byt waitlist for early access to
  crypto-powered savings and DeFi tools.
